title: Add chasewebb 9x512 sp1024 baseline (val_bpb: 1.2355)
body:
## Summary

- 9-layer 512-dim transformer, 1024 vocab (SentencePiece BPE), GQA (8 heads / 4 KV heads)
- Trained on 80 FineWeb shards (~8B tokens), ~580s on 8xH100s
- Final **val_bpb: 1.2355**, model size: 15.87MB (int8+zlib)

## Test plan

- [x] Model fits within 16MB limit (15.87MB)
- [x] Training completed within 10 min wallclock cap
- [x] int8+zlib roundtrip validation confirmed

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
